-- sluice schema diff
-- source: postgres (1 tables expected after translation)
-- target: postgres (2 tables found)
-- result: 1 extra table, 1 missing column, 1 type mismatch
--
-- The ALTER/DROP statements below are starting points for manual
-- reconciliation. sluice does not execute them. Review carefully
-- before running them against the target.

-- ──────────── deprecated_log (extra on target) ────────────
DROP TABLE "deprecated_log";
-- ^ not in source schema; sluice would not create it

-- ──────────── users (mismatched) ────────────
ALTER TABLE "users" ADD COLUMN "created_at" Timestamp(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT now(); -- column missing on target
ALTER TABLE "users" ALTER COLUMN "email" TYPE Varchar(255); -- on target: Varchar(100)
